name: Supply Depot
notes: Camp Cozy only — a support-vehicle specialist production building, distinct from Factory's combat-vehicle roster. Unlocks, in order: Engineer, Ambulance, Transport Truck, Repair Truck, Mule, Volt Truck. Engineer, Ambulance, and Transport Truck are also Factory unlocks elsewhere (see data/buildings/factory.json) — shared across both buildings, same pattern as Juggernaut/Rocket Tank across Tank Plant/Frostworks.
